text: Amazon is positioned among the Magnificent Seven technology giants reporting quarterly earnings during the week of July 28, 2025, with investors closely monitoring results from companies representing a combined $11.3 trillion in market capitalization. Analyst anticipation has intensified following UBS's price target increase, which contributed to upward momentum in Amazon's stock price. Market commentary suggests AI-powered AWS growth and advertising revenue expansion are key factors underpinning the upbeat Q2 outlook for the company.
